cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-cleanup.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c tests/c_backend_cleanup_dedupe_module_01.f90 -o "$tmpdir/mod.o"; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -I"$tmpdir" -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o"; count=$(grep -R "cleanup_struct_c_backend_cleanup_dedupe_module_01__box" "$tmpdir"/*.o.tmp.split/*.c | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf "%s\n" "$count"; test "$count" = "2" #
